feed.title: Sagar Biswas Portfolio Feed
feed.subtitle: Software developer portfolio, programming notebooks, and cybersecurity blog by Sagar Biswas

entry.title: Software Developer Portfolio — Sagar Biswas
entry.summary: Full-stack software developer portfolio featuring cybersecurity notes, programming notebooks, open-source projects, and a technical blog by Sagar Biswas.

entry.title: Bash Scripting Tutorial and Shell Script Examples
entry.summary: Comprehensive bash scripting tutorial and shell script examples covering Linux command line essentials for beginners and intermediate users.

entry.title: C and C++ Programming Notebook
entry.summary: C programming tutorial and C++ notebook covering headers, projects, tricks, and practical examples for students and beginners.

entry.title: Cybersecurity Notes and Ethical Hacking Guide
entry.summary: Cybersecurity notes and ethical hacking guide covering CTF writeups, network security, and practical defense techniques.

entry.title: Git Commands Cheat Sheet and GitHub Workflow Guide
entry.summary: Complete Git commands cheat sheet and GitHub workflow guide for beginners — covering branching, merging, pull requests, and collaboration.

entry.title: JavaScript Tutorial and Vanilla JS Examples
entry.summary: JavaScript tutorial and vanilla JS examples notebook — covering core language features, DOM manipulation, and practical programming patterns.

entry.title: React Tutorial and React Hooks Guide
entry.summary: React tutorial and hooks guide with practical project examples — covering components, state management, and modern React patterns for beginners.

entry.title: PHP Tutorial and PHP Examples Notebook
entry.summary: PHP programming tutorial and example notebook covering server-side scripting, forms, databases, and practical PHP development patterns.

entry.title: Python Tutorial and Python Examples Notebook
entry.summary: Python programming tutorial and notebook covering core syntax, data structures, scripting, and practical Python examples for beginners.

entry.title: NestJS Tutorial and NestJS Project Examples
entry.summary: NestJS tutorial and project examples notebook covering modules, controllers, services, and building scalable Node.js backend applications.

entry.title: Why Attackers Like the Temp Folder and How You Can Protect Your PC
entry.summary: Why malware targets the Windows Temp folder and practical steps to reduce your exposure to these attacks.

entry.title: Understanding OSI Layers Through Real Attack Examples
entry.summary: A practical OSI model walkthrough mapping each layer to real attack patterns and defensive habits for beginners.

entry.title: Quantum Computers vs Encryption
entry.summary: Quantum computers threaten RSA and ECC encryption. Learn what NIST post-quantum standards exist and what organizations should do now.

entry.title: Anonymity Is Not Absolute — What Works
entry.summary: Real anonymity depends on identity separation and behavioral discipline — not just VPNs and proxies.

entry.title: Full-Page Screenshot in DevTools
entry.summary: Capture a full-page screenshot in Chrome or Edge using the DevTools Command Menu — no extensions needed.

entry.title: Printer Attack — The Silent Entry Point
entry.summary: How a network printer becomes an easy entry point for attackers and practical steps to secure it.

entry.title: Vibe Coding Tech Debt
entry.summary: AI enables fast delivery but poor decisions create compounding complexity — a guide on what to keep and what to cut.

entry.title: Wi-Fi Security Alert — MAC Blocking Is Not Enough
entry.summary: MAC address blocking is trivially bypassed on modern devices. Change your Wi-Fi password and tighten router settings instead.

entry.title: WSL2 + Kali Linux + Win-KeX Setup Guide
entry.summary: Beginner-friendly WSL2 + Kali Linux + Win-KeX setup guide with exact commands, screenshots, and fixes.
